hypotheses.name: Full-vocabulary residual drift + GO enrichment
hypotheses.method: Compute L2(layer_11 - layer_0) for all 4803 scGPT gene positions. Map 209 named genes to their embedding indices. Compute named-gene drift percentile in full-vocab context (named genes at 84th pct). Run GO BP enrichment (Fisher exact, top-50 vs bottom-50 named genes by drift). 288 terms tested.
hypotheses.result_value: GO:0000981 (TF activity RNA Pol II) OR=3.30, p=0.0078; 6/288 terms p<0.05; 0 FDR<0.05
hypotheses.next_action: Add feature-shuffle null control to confirm drift-enrichment is not an artifact of the named-gene selection bias. Increase power by expanding to full vocab gene names.

hypotheses.name: SVD biology of near-rank-1 layer-11 subspace
hypotheses.method: SVD of full 4803x512 mean-centered layer-11 embedding matrix. Project 209 named genes onto top singular vectors. GO BP enrichment (Fisher exact) for top-25% vs bottom-25% named genes by signed SV1 loading. 284 terms tested. Also: compute SVD for layer-0 to quantify compression ratio.
hypotheses.result_value: GO:0005615 (extracellular space) OR=6.37, p=0.0003; 3/284 terms p<0.05; 0 FDR<0.05. Layer-11 top-5 SVs explain 96.8% var (vs 65.6% at layer-0). SV1/SV2 ratio = 7.7x.
hypotheses.next_action: Run feature-shuffle null on SV1 enrichment (decisive biological specificity test). Extend SVD across all 12 layers to track when extracellular axis emerges. Test bottom-quartile SV1 for nuclear/TF enrichment as complementary pole.

hypotheses.name: Effective rank curvature and compression breakpoint
hypotheses.method: First and second finite differences of ER across 12 layers from iter_0005 data. Compute max compression rate layer, inflection point, and ER half-life layer. Cross-correlate ER with TwoNN (Pearson + Spearman).
hypotheses.result_value: Max rate at layer 1 (−2.49 ER/layer), inflection at layer 3, half-life at layer 4. ER 6.17x fold change (7.89→1.28). Pearson r(ER,TwoNN)=0.793 p=0.0021.
hypotheses.next_action: Extend ER curvature analysis to layer-wise SVD across all 12 layers to track when SV1 dominance emerges. Characterize whether breakpoint (layers 1-4) corresponds to specific attention head patterns.
